caption:
Your junk = community help 🙏

Everything we collect that can be salvaged goes to local charities and recycling centers. That old dresser? Someone's new treasure. Those cardboard boxes? Recycled into something new.

Clean space for you. Less waste for the planet. Win-win. 🌍
